column1: # /Worksheet Global Format — set the workbook-wide default cell format.
# Cells without an explicit per-cell format inherit the global; cells
# with /Range Format applied still win over the global.
# Pick Fixed → decimals prompt (default 2) → type 4 → ENTER. No POINT
# step: the global is applied immediately.
# A1 (no per-cell override) inherits the new global. Tag and grid
# /RFC 0 ENTER ENTER on A:A2 — per-cell format wins over the global.
# A1 (no per-cell override) follows the new global.
# /RFR on A2 — drop the per-cell override; A2 now inherits the
# Worksheet Status reflects the current global format.
# /WGFC ENTER — set global to Currency 2 (default decimals); status
